title: Approved-window copy/paste harness
mission: Implement the approved-window copy/paste harness: detect a specific operator-approved target window, require an explicit per-run approval token, and only then paste a prompt packet that was already copied to the clipboard. Add a clipboard guard, a kill switch, and an auto-stop on errors. Do not press Enter or submit; the operator submits manually in this milestone.
files_forbidden: any real secret, token, or chat id
any file outside the repo root
expected_output: An IMPLEMENTED_AND_PUSHED packet with branch, commit, validation, and what remains disabled. The harness must default to dry-run and never auto-submit.
safety_rules: Push the feature branch only; never push or merge main.
No AI attribution trailers in commits.
No shell-string subprocess and no PowerShell expression invocation.
No auto-submit, no Enter key, no window focus stealing without explicit approval.
No live agent launch, no MCP, no live browser/computer-use, no OS click/type without approval.
